Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ConfigureShaderTarget method sets optional configuration settings for the renderer to use when loading and compiling shader code.

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The target-specific shader configuration structure to apply before shader code is loaded.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
